title: Childcare access and retention at high-premium firms
primary_threat: childcare openings may target neighborhoods with changing labor demand
strengthening_move: Document pre-trends, anticipation windows, and untreated comparison-group logic.

title: Manager assignment and gendered promotion ratings
primary_threat: manager moves may be correlated with team performance shocks

title: Commuting safety and application radius
primary_threat: route upgrades may coincide with local economic development

title: Pay transparency and firm job redesign
primary_threat: firms may manipulate headcount around the threshold

title: Nonbinary identity signals and callback heterogeneity
primary_threat: resume signal may not represent disclosure or perceived identity in real workplaces

title: AI scheduling tools and gendered hours volatility

title: Representation in local councils and enforcement of workplace protections
